name: tally-mcp-server
description: Read from and write to TallyPrime (ledgers, vouchers, P&L, balance sheet, stock, SQL cache) directly from Claude.
long_description: Connects Claude to a locally running TallyPrime via its XML/HTTP gateway. Supports reading ledgers, groups, stock items, vouchers, and standard reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Trial Balance, Stock Summary, Bills Receivable/Payable), creating ledgers/groups/stock items/vouchers, and syncing data into a local SQL cache for fast ad-hoc querying.

tally_url.title: TallyPrime Gateway URL
tally_url.description: The HTTP address of TallyPrime's XML gateway
